boss.name: Abyssal Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Leviathan's core using the Thermal Vent Catalyst.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct collapses the wall, revealing the path to the Inner Trenches.

encounters.trigger: The death of the eel deactivates the bioluminescent traps, clearing the way to the Volcanic Forge.
Shattering the Guardian triggers the awakening of the boss in the deep abyss.

output.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Deep while surviving the Abyssal Leviathan.

boss.name: Abyssal Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Channel the stolen life force through the Soul Anchor to shatter the Leviathan's protective carapace.
boss.weakness: Must be struck with the Soul Anchor artifact to penetrate its hardened skin.

pickup.effect: Allows the user to bind enemy spirits to their will
pickup.name: Ethereal Shackles

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guard causes the temple seal to crack, drawing the second guardian from the abyss.

enemy.name: Corrupted Coral Construct
enemy.weakness: Ethereal Shackles (to dissolve the coral structure)

pickup.effect: Acts as a conduit for pure death energy
pickup.name: Soul Anchor

encounters.trigger: Shattering the construct releases a beacon that summons the final sentry.

enemy.name: Ghostly Anglerfish Beast
enemy.weakness: Soul Anchor (to ground the spirit entity)

encounters.trigger: Binding the beast's spirit opens the final gate to the Leviathan's chamber.

output.objective: Navigate the cursed underwater ruins, reclaim the stolen artifacts, and banish the Abyssal Leviathan back to the void.
output.reward: The Trident of the Deep Necropolis

boss.name: Abyssal Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Channel the 'Voltaic Stabilizer' into the Leviathan's glowing core while its defenses are down.

enemy.name: Pressure-Shell Crab
enemy.weakness: Vulnerable to the Stormcaller's default 'Arc Lash' weapon.

pickup.effect: Grants shock resistance and boosts Arc damage
pickup.name: Conductive Essence

encounters.trigger: Upon defeating the Crab, the pressure seal to the deeper tunnel ruptures, drawing you forward.

enemy.name: Electric Eel Swarm
enemy.weakness: Weak to the 'Conductive Essence' absorbed from the previous area.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the swarm reveals an ancient control panel that activates the lift to the Leviathan's Lair.

enemy.name: Guardian Construct
enemy.weakness: Vulnerable to the amplified 'Arc Lash' combined with 'Conductive Essence'.

encounters.trigger: The Construct's defeat unlocks the heavy bulkhead door, leading directly to the boss chamber.

output.objective: Navigate the Abyss and slay the Abyssal Leviathan to restore power to the colony.
output.reward: The Abyssal Heart (Source of Infinite Energy)
